scripts.build:admin: cd .. && npm run build:admin && node -e "const fs=require('fs');const path=require('path');const src=path.join(process.cwd(),'..','dist','admin');const dst=path.join(process.cwd(),'dist','admin');if(fs.existsSync(src)){fs.rmSync(dst,{recursive:true,force:true});fs.cpSync(src,dst,{recursive:true})}"
